title: Cooper Companies (COO) Q3 Earnings In Line, '23 Outlook Raised

title: The Cooper Companies (COO) Q3 Earnings: Taking a Look at Key Metrics Versus Estimates
text: Although the revenue and EPS for The Cooper Companies (COO) give a sense of how its business performed in the quarter ended July 2023, it might be worth considering how some key metrics compare with Wall Street estimates and the year-ago numbers.

title: The Cooper Companies (COO) Q3 Earnings Match Estimates
text: The Cooper Companies (COO) came out with quarterly earnings of $3.35 per share, in line with the Zacks Consensus Estimate. This compares to earnings of $3.19 per share a year ago.

title: CooperCompanies Announces Third Quarter 2023 Results
text: SAN RAMON, Calif., Aug. 30, 2023 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- CooperCompanies (NYSE: COO) today announced financial results for its fiscal third quarter ended July 31, 2023.

title: Why The Cooper Companies (COO) is Poised to Beat Earnings Estimates Again

title: Reasons to Add The Cooper Companies (COO) to Your Portfolio
text: The Cooper Companies (COO) continues to benefit from strength in its business segments. Its acquisitions are likely to drive the top line further.

title: CooperCompanies to Present at the Wells Fargo Healthcare Conference
text: SAN RAMON, Calif., Aug. 02, 2023 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- CooperCompanies (NYSE: COO), will participate in the Wells Fargo Healthcare Conference on Wednesday, September 6, 2023. Al White, President and CEO, will represent the Company in a session scheduled to begin at 3:00 PM ET.
